title: Moon Ghost: Tales from the UnderMoon
original_title: Moon Ghost: Tales From the UnderMoon
overview: Sigmund the Moon Wizard hosts this feature-length anthology of hair-raising short stories set in the absurd Moon Ghost Cinematic Universe, including segments about Moon Ghost's rampage on Mars and the feast of the sinister Were-Moon Ghost.
